basics.description:
**Note:** Please refer to the following before installing the solution: • Review the solution [Release Notes](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/tree/master/Solutions/BlueVoyant%20Anthropic%20ClaudeCompliance/ReleaseNotes.md) • There may be [known issues](https://aka.ms/sentinelsolutionsknownissues) pertaining to this Solution, please refer to them before installing. The BlueVoyant Anthropic Claude Compliance solution for Microsoft Sentinel ingests compliance activity data from the Anthropic Claude Compliance API into your workspace. Using a Codeless Connector Framework (CCF) data connector, it continuously collects compliance events into the BV_ClaudeCompliance_ComplianceActivities_CL table for monitoring, hunting, and detection.

Underlying Microsoft Technologies used:

This solution takes a dependency on the following technologies, and some of these dependencies either may be in Preview state or might result in additional ingestion or operational costs:

  • Codeless Connector Framework (CCF) data connector
  • Azure Monitor Data Collection Rules (DCR)
  • Azure Monitor Data Collection Endpoints (DCE)
  • Log Analytics custom tables
**Data Connectors:** 1 [Learn more about Microsoft Sentinel](https://aka.ms/azuresentinel) | [Learn more about Solutions](https://aka.ms/azuresentinelsolutionsdoc)

metadata.hidden: Hiding location, we get it from the log analytics workspace

basics.label: Workspace
basics.toolTip: This dropdown will list only workspace that exists in the Resource Group selected

options.text: This Solution installs the data connector for BV-ClaudeCompliance (via Codeless Connector Framework). You can get BV-ClaudeCompliance (via Codeless Connector Framework) data in your Microsoft Sentinel workspace. After installing the solution, configure and enable this data connector by following guidance in Manage solution view.

link.label: Learn more about connecting data sources
